meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding to Debug Code: Student Guide
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to implement user onboarding to track errors effectively using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert student guide.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just about reading logs; it's about context. By implementing structured user onboarding, you capture the user's journey, making state-related bugs visible. Use Antigravity to instrument your flow and Claude Code to automate the analysis, turning mysterious crashes into actionable, fixable code segments immediately.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank terminal, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat you can't quite synchronize with your code. Every developer has been there: the 'it works on my machine' syndrome that turns into a midnight debugging marathon. The frustration isn't a sign of failure; it is the friction of growth.

The secret to shipping robust apps isn't just writing better code—it’s building better observability into your user's first experience. When you master user onboarding, you create a breadcrumb trail of events that makes your bugs impossible to hide. You are about to move from guessing where things break to surgical precision in your development process.

steps.title: Instrument the First-Time User Experience
steps.description: Define key touchpoints in your onboarding flow to ensure you have logs for every user action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current onboarding flow and suggest 5 high-impact events to track for debugging purposes.

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Logging
steps.description: Wrap your onboarding logic in try-catch blocks that capture the specific user state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Rewrite this onboarding function to include detailed error logging that captures local state and input variables.

steps.title: Simulate User Edge Cases
steps.description: Use automated testing to simulate users skipping steps or providing malformed data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of unit tests for my onboarding flow that specifically target invalid user input scenarios.

steps.title: Automate Error Pattern Recognition
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan your logs for repeating patterns that indicate logical bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review these log snippets from my onboarding flow and identify the most likely root cause for the recent crashes.

steps.title: Refactor Based on Debug Insights
steps.description: Apply the fixes identified during your analysis to stabilize the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the identified fixes to my codebase and ensure the error handling logic is robust against future regressions.

pro_tips: Always log the user's device state alongside errors to differentiate between browser-specific bugs and logical failures.
Use feature flags to roll out onboarding changes, allowing you to debug in production without breaking the app for everyone.
Treat your onboarding flow as a state machine; if a user is in state A, they can only move to B, never directly to C.
When using Claude Code, provide the full file context rather than snippets to prevent hallucinations during the debugging phase.
Set up automated alerts for your onboarding error logs so you find the bugs before your users do.
resources: MDN Web Docs on Error Handling: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Statements/try...catch
content.next_steps: Now that you have debugged your onboarding flow, document your findings in a GitHub issue to track your learning progress and apply these same observability patterns to your app's core features.
content.conversion_block: Your journey from student to seasoned engineer begins with the first bug you conquer. Don't let code complexity stop your progress; use these tools to build with confidence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
